questions.label: How many people will be using the software?
What products or services does your company offer?
questions.placeholder: e.g., SaaS platform for project management, commercial HVAC installation, online tutoring...

questions.label: What software are you currently using?
questions.placeholder: e.g., QuickBooks, Salesforce, Google Sheets, Slack, Mailchimp...

questions.label: Which software are you open to replacing? Which will remain in place?
questions.placeholder: e.g., Open to replacing Mailchimp and our CRM. Keeping QuickBooks and Slack.

questions.label: What are your biggest pain points?
questions.subtitle: Select all that apply.
options: Lack of visibility into team activities

questions.label: Any specific requirements?
questions.placeholder: e.g., Must integrate with QuickBooks, needs mobile access, HIPAA compliance required...

questions.label: What is the biggest worry for your team or organization?
questions.placeholder: e.g., We're growing fast and our current tools can't keep up...
